## Checklist

- [ ] I did not add LLM/RAG/Agent behavior to Level 1.
- [ ] I ran the relevant starter checks.
- [ ] I kept the change small and focused.

## Data hygiene (see [DATA_POLICY.md](../DATA_POLICY.md))

- [ ] I did not include secrets, API keys, tokens or credentials.
- [ ] I did not include real production logs.
- [ ] I did not include real customer data.
- [ ] I did not include real corporate data.
- [ ] I did not include real PII (names, emails, phone numbers, CPF/CNPJ, etc.).
- [ ] Every dataset and example is **synthetic**.
- [ ] I ran local validation (`python3 scripts/validate.py`).
- [ ] I reviewed any AI-generated content for accidentally real data.
- [ ] My examples do **not** encourage learners to publish sensitive data.
